creator: jah4007@cs.rit.edu
text:
Update the cups port from 1.1.6 to 1.1.10. This pr obsoletes ports/28209 which was my previous update to this port that slipped through the cracks...

Whoever commits this please also close the previous pr.

Fix: 

Download my patch from:
http://www.cs.rit.edu/~jah4007/FreeBSD/cups.patch

cd to /usr/ports/print
patch < /path/to/cups.patch
